SELECT h.id, h.address_en, h.address_ru, h.address_tj, h.available_rooms, h.city_en, h.city_ru, h.city_tj, h.created_at, h.created_by_user_id, h.deleted_at, h.deleted_by_user_id, h.description_en, h.description_ru, h.description_tj, h.has_gym, h.has_parking, h.has_pool, h.has_restaurant, h.has_wifi, h.image_url, h.is_budget, h.is_deleted, h.is_family_friendly, h.is_luxury, h.latitude, h.longitude, h.name_en, h.name_ru, h.name_tj, h.owner_id, h.phone_number, h.price_per_night, h.rating_average, h.reviews_count, h.slug, h.stars, h.status, h.total_rooms, h.updated_at, h.updated_by_user_id, h.website_url
FROM hotels AS h

    SELECT g.id, g.bio_en, g.bio_ru, g.bio_tj, g.city_en, g.city_ru, g.city_tj, g.created_at, g.created_by_user_id, g.deleted_at, g.deleted_by_user_id, g.experience_years, g.image_url, g.is_available, g.is_deleted, g.languages, g.price_per_day, g.rating_average, g.reviews_count, g.status, g.updated_at, g.updated_by_user_id, g.user_id
    FROM guides AS g
    WHERE NOT (g.is_deleted)
    ORDER BY g.experience_years DESC
    LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0
) AS g0
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT u.id, u.created_at, u.created_by_user_id, u.deleted_at, u.deleted_by_user_id, u.email, u.email_confirmed, u.full_name, u.is_active, u.is_deleted, u.last_login_at, u.password_hash, u.phone_number, u.role, u.updated_at, u.updated_by_user_id
    FROM users AS u
    WHERE NOT (u.is_deleted)
) AS u0 ON g0.user_id = u0.id
ORDER BY g0.experience_years DESC

FROM (
    SELECT g.id, g.bio_en, g.bio_ru, g.bio_tj, g.city_en, g.city_ru, g.city_tj, g.created_at, g.created_by_user_id, g.deleted_at, g.deleted_by_user_id, g.experience_years, g.image_url, g.is_available, g.is_deleted, g.languages, g.price_per_day, g.rating_average, g.reviews_count, g.status, g.updated_at, g.updated_by_user_id, g.user_id
    FROM guides AS g
    WHERE NOT (g.is_deleted)
    ORDER BY g.experience_years DESC
    LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0
) AS g0
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT u.id, u.created_at, u.created_by_user_id, u.deleted_at, u.deleted_by_user_id, u.email, u.email_confirmed, u.full_name, u.is_active, u.is_deleted, u.last_login_at, u.password_hash, u.phone_number, u.role, u.updated_at, u.updated_by_user_id
    FROM users AS u
    WHERE NOT (u.is_deleted)
) AS u0 ON g0.user_id = u0.id
ORDER BY g0.experience_years DESC

SELECT g0.id, g0.bio, g0.city, g0.created_at, g0.created_by_user_id, g0.deleted_at, g0.deleted_by_user_id, g0.experience_years, g0.image_url, g0.is_available, g0.is_deleted, g0.languages, g0.price_per_day, g0.rating_average, g0.reviews_count, g0.status, g0.updated_at, g0.updated_by_user_id, g0.user_id, u0.id, u0.created_at, u0.created_by_user_id, u0.deleted_at, u0.deleted_by_user_id, u0.email, u0.email_confirmed, u0.full_name, u0.is_active, u0.is_deleted, u0.last_login_at, u0.password_hash, u0.phone_number, u0.role, u0.updated_at, u0.updated_by_user_id
FROM (
    SELECT g.id, g.bio, g.city, g.created_at, g.created_by_user_id, g.deleted_at, g.deleted_by_user_id, g.experience_years, g.image_url, g.is_available, g.is_deleted, g.languages, g.price_per_day, g.rating_average, g.reviews_count, g.status, g.updated_at, g.updated_by_user_id, g.user_id
    FROM guides AS g
    WHERE NOT (g.is_deleted)
    ORDER BY g.experience_years DESC
    LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0
) AS g0
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT u.id, u.created_at, u.created_by_user_id, u.deleted_at, u.deleted_by_user_id, u.email, u.email_confirmed, u.full_name, u.is_active, u.is_deleted, u.last_login_at, u.password_hash, u.phone_number, u.role, u.updated_at, u.updated_by_user_id
    FROM users AS u
    WHERE NOT (u.is_deleted)
) AS u0 ON g0.user_id = u0.id
ORDER BY g0.experience_years DESC

FROM (
    SELECT b.id, b.booking_type, b.cancelled_at, b.confirmed_at, b.created_at, b.created_by_user_id, b.deleted_at, b.deleted_by_user_id, b.end_date, b.guests_count, b.is_deleted, b.notes, b.quantity, b.reference_id, b.start_date, b.status, b.total_price, b.updated_at, b.updated_by_user_id, b.user_id
    FROM bookings AS b
    WHERE NOT (b.is_deleted)
    ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0
) AS b0
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT u.id, u.created_at, u.created_by_user_id, u.deleted_at, u.deleted_by_user_id, u.email, u.email_confirmed, u.full_name, u.is_active, u.is_deleted, u.last_login_at, u.password_hash, u.phone_number, u.role, u.updated_at, u.updated_by_user_id
    FROM users AS u
    WHERE NOT (u.is_deleted)
) AS u0 ON b0.user_id = u0.id
ORDER BY b0.created_at DESC

    SELECT g.id, g.bio, g.city, g.created_at, g.created_by_user_id, g.deleted_at, g.deleted_by_user_id, g.experience_years, g.image_url, g.is_available, g.is_deleted, g.languages, g.price_per_day, g.rating_average, g.reviews_count, g.status, g.updated_at, g.updated_by_user_id, g.user_id

    ORDER BY g.experience_years DESC
    LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0
) AS g0

    SELECT u.id, u.created_at, u.created_by_user_id, u.deleted_at, u.deleted_by_user_id, u.email, u.email_confirmed, u.full_name, u.is_active, u.is_deleted, u.last_login_at, u.password_hash, u.phone_number, u.role, u.updated_at, u.updated_by_user_id

    WHERE NOT (u.is_deleted)
) AS u0 ON g0.user_id = u0.id

SELECT g0.id, g0.bio, g0.city, g0.created_at, g0.created_by_user_id, g0.deleted_at, g0.deleted_by_user_id, g0.experience_years, g0.image_url, g0.is_available, g0.is_deleted, g0.languages, g0.price_per_day, g0.rating_average, g0.reviews_count, g0.status, g0.updated_at, g0.updated_by_user_id, g0.user_id, u0.id, u0.created_at, u0.created_by_user_id, u0.deleted_at, u0.deleted_by_user_id, u0.email, u0.email_confirmed, u0.full_name, u0.is_active, u0.is_deleted, u0.last_login_at, u0.password_hash, u0.phone_number, u0.role, u0.updated_at, u0.updated_by_user_id
FROM (
    SELECT g.id, g.bio, g.city, g.created_at, g.created_by_user_id, g.deleted_at, g.deleted_by_user_id, g.experience_years, g.image_url, g.is_available, g.is_deleted, g.languages, g.price_per_day, g.rating_average, g.reviews_count, g.status, g.updated_at, g.updated_by_user_id, g.user_id
    FROM guides AS g
    WHERE NOT (g.is_deleted)
    ORDER BY g.experience_years DESC
    LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0
) AS g0
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT u.id, u.created_at, u.created_by_user_id, u.deleted_at, u.deleted_by_user_id, u.email, u.email_confirmed, u.full_name, u.is_active, u.is_deleted, u.last_login_at, u.password_hash, u.phone_number, u.role, u.updated_at, u.updated_by_user_id
    FROM users AS u
    WHERE NOT (u.is_deleted)
) AS u0 ON g0.user_id = u0.id
